mapper.insert: insert into pf_course(course_name, coach_id, coach_name, course_date, start_time, end_time, max_capacity, current_booked, location, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{courseName}, #{coachId}, #{coachName}, #{courseDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{maxCapacity}, 0, #{location}, 'SCHEDULED', now(), now())
mapper.update: update pf_course set current_booked = current_booked + 1 where id = #{id}
update pf_course set current_booked = current_booked - 1 where id = #{id} and current_booked > 0
